details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest soil moisture starter kit (cellular, <=$600, >=4.5 stars)
Task 2: Select fastest-update kit under $1,200 and add 2 units to cart
Task 3: Configure 200-acre corn analytics subscription under $250/month with required features
Task 4: ROI calculator scenario with payback <= 18 months (with optional adjustment)
Task 5: Choose cheapest sensor bundle (or equivalent) for target coverage and add to cart
Task 6: Open corn case study (>=15% yield improvement, year >= 2022) and view results section
Task 7: Submit quote request for 3 weather stations and 10 soil probes on 500-acre farm
Task 8: Build custom sensor network (5 soil probes, 2 weather stations, LoRaWAN, annual analytics) and add to cart
Task 9: Create 14-day analytics dashboard trial account (corn, daily refresh)
